calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Dec-29-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Canatella (Counsel for Eva Morris, Personal Representative); John Canatella (with Richard Canatella for Eva Morris, Personal Representative); Badma Gutchinov (Counsel for Lora Mathis, Petitioner).

At the Court's request, Mr. Gutchinov noted that he had no objection to the accounting. The Court, however, noted that the Examiner's notes reflected certain concerns, particularly with respect to accounting for the in-kind distribution of the decedent's automobiles. Mr. Canatella advised the Court that he had filed responsive pleadings concerning that issue (and also concerning requested administrator fees) and that the proposed Order reflected the same. The Court took the matter under submission for further review by the Court Examiner.

Judicial Office: Dorothy L. McMath, Commissioner; Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR #7782 ; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: None.
